query:
SELECT 
  q.id,
  q.versionNumber,
  q.baseQuotationId,
  q.parentQuotationId,
  q.quotationNumber,
  q.total,
  p.id as projectId,
  p.quotationId as projectQuotationId,
  p.totalAmount
FROM quotations q
LEFT JOIN projects p ON q.id = p.quotationId
WHERE q.quotationNumber LIKE '%Álvaro prueba%'
ORDER BY q.versionNumber DESC
LIMIT 10;

  q.quotationNumber,
  q.total,

  p.quotationId as projectQuotationId,
  p.totalAmount
FROM quotations q
LEFT JOIN projects p ON q.id = p.quotationId
WHERE q.quotationNumber LIKE '%Álvaro prueba%'
ORDER BY q.versionNumber DESC
LIMIT 10;
